info.title: MUNSCCUL Core Banking System
info.description:
MUNSCCUL Next-Gen Core Banking System API
    
    A modern, COBAC-compliant core banking solution for Credit Unions in Cameroon.
    
    ## Features
    
    - **Member Management (KYC)**: Full KYC compliance with biometric support
    - **Core Transactions**: Deposits, withdrawals, transfers with double-entry bookkeeping
    - **Loan Management**: Configurable products, amortization schedules, guarantor management
    - **Regulatory Reporting**: COBAC-compliant reports and immutable audit trails
    - **Offline-First**: Works without internet for up to 7 days
    
    ## Authentication
    
    All endpoints require JWT authentication. Use `/auth/login` to obtain a token.
    
    ## Compliance
    
    - COBAC Regulation EMF R-2017/06
    - Cameroon Data Protection Law 2024/017
    - OHADA Accounting Standards
    - OHADA Accounting Standards

post.description:
Authenticate user with brute force protection and refresh token

- **username**: User's username
- **password**: User's password

Returns access token (15 min expiry) and refresh token (7 days expiry)
Forced setup for first-time login: set new password and initial PIN.
Self-service PIN update. Requires current password verification.
Admin-triggered PIN reset. Generates a token and simulated email.
Confirm PIN reset using the token provided in the email.

Refresh access token using refresh token
Implements token rotation for security
Logout from a single session (revoke specific refresh token)

Set up two-factor authentication
(Placeholder - full TOTP implementation would require additional libraries)

Verify 2FA code and complete login
(Placeholder - full TOTP implementation would require additional libraries)

- Generates unique Member ID with check digit
- Validates required KYC fields per COBAC regulations

post.description:
Create a new account for a member

- Generates unique account number
- Assigns OHADA-compliant account class

schema.title: Response List Accounts Api V1 Accounts Get

post.description:
Process a cash deposit

- Updates account balance immediately
- Creates immutable transaction record
- Enforces minimum deposit amount

Process a share purchase (Social Capital Registration)

- Validates account type is SHARES
- Enforces multiples of share price
- Credits GL 2020 (Social Capital)

Onboard a new member with their first payment.
- Credits 2020 (Shares) with shares_amount
- Credits 4210 (Revenue) with fee_amount
- Debits Teller Cash (1020 or configured)

Process a cash withdrawal

- Validates sufficient funds
- Enforces maximum withdrawal limit
- Requires manager approval for large amounts

Process an account-to-account transfer

- Transfers funds between member accounts
- Creates two transaction records (debit and credit)

Approve or reject a pending transaction (Four-Eyes Principle)

- Only Branch Managers can approve transactions
- Approver cannot be the same as creator

get.description: List all pending transaction overrides for the manager's branch

post.description:
Directly approve an override from the Ops Manager dashboard.
Uses manager's PIN for remote verification.
Reject an override request. Reverses the PENDING transaction.

get.description: Get daily cash position report for branch managers

post.description: Create a new loan product (Ops Manager only)

put.description:
Deactivate a loan product ("Safety Lock").
Prevents further use but keeps history.

get.description:
COBAC Pre-Check: Verify member eligibility before loan application.
Called automatically by the Credit Officer wizard at Step 2.

post.description:
Submit a loan application

- Validates member eligibility
- Calculates amortization schedule
- Handles guarantor requirements

schema.title: Response List Loan Applications Api V1 Loans Applications Get

post.description:
Submit a DRAFT loan for review (Step 2 & 3)
- Places AccountHold on Guarantors' savings accounts
- Changes status to PENDING_REVIEW

Return a loan application to the Credit Officer for correction.
- Only Managers / Ops Managers / Ops Directors can return loans
- Status changes from PENDING_REVIEW -> RETURNED
- Releases all guarantor AccountHolds (liens)

get.description: Get loan application details with schedule

post.description:
Approve or reject a loan application

- Only Credit Officers or Managers can approve
- Approver cannot be the same as applicant

Disburse an approved loan to member's account

- Creates disbursement transaction
- Updates loan status to DISBURSED

Process a loan repayment

- Validates loan is active
- Updates payment tracking
- Creates repayment transaction

post.description:
Collect payment from customer via mobile money

- **provider**: mtn_momo or orange_money
- **phone_number**: Customer phone number
- **amount**: Amount to collect (FCFA)
- **account_id**: Account to credit

Disburse funds to customer via mobile money

- **provider**: mtn_momo or orange_money
- **phone_number**: Recipient phone number
- **amount**: Amount to send (FCFA)
- **account_id**: Account to debit

Handle callback from mobile money provider

This endpoint is called by the mobile money provider
to notify us of transaction status updates
Configure a mobile money provider (Admin only)

Transfer excess cash from teller drawer to main vault (Vault Drop).
Reduces the teller's specific GL account and increases the main vault GL.

Submit Blind End-of-Day reconciliation. The teller counts their physical cash and 
submits denominations. The system compares it to their expected drawer balance.
Verify a manager's PIN for in-place transaction override when a teller exceeds their drawer limit.
Verify the teller's PIN to unlock an auto-locked session.

get.description: Get the current physical cash balance in the teller's drawer (based on GL).

Check the End-of-Day status for a specific date (defaults to today).
Returns whether the day is already closed, and if not, whether it CAN be closed (checks passed).

post.description: Step 3 of EOD Wizard: Post daily interest to savings accounts.

schema.title: Response Accrue Interest Api V1 Eod Accrue Post

post.description: Step 4: Final closure and locking of the branch.

Issue a new ticket (used by Kiosk).
Determines next prefix and number based on service type.

Teller requests the next ticket based on service type.
Enforces FIFO + VIP Priority.

get.description: Get all active treasury accounts for the current branch

schema.title: Response Get Treasury Accounts Api V1 Treasury Accounts Get

post.description:
Genesis Deposit: Debit Vault (1010), Credit Retained Earnings (3010).
Used to set the initial physical cash balance in the system.

Initiate a cash transfer request (Morning Float, Vault Drop, or External Treasury Sweep).
Does not affect GL until approved by a manager (or Board if > limit).

get.description: List all pending cash transfers for the manager's branch

schema.title: Response Get Pending Transfers Api V1 Treasury Transfers Pending Get

post.description:
Manager authorization for a cash transfer.
If approved, posts the double-entry transaction to the GL.
Record cash brought from a commercial bank (External Flow).

Post historical GL opening balances for COBAC audit compliance.
Used to bootstrap accounts that existed before the digital system.

Each entry must have: { debit_gl_code, credit_gl_code, amount, description }

Common usage:
  - Vault cash: DR 1010 / CR 3010 (Retained Earnings)
  - Share capital: DR 1010 / CR 2020 (Member Share Capital)  
  - Member savings: DR 1010 / CR 2010 (Member Savings)
  - Afriland balance: DR 1030 / CR 3010

COBAC Audit Tool: Backfill GL journal entries from actual account balances.

Scans all active member accounts and creates OPENING_BALANCE GL entries
where no prior GL entry exists. This resolves the zero-equity problem â
the Trial Balance will correctly reflect Share Capital (2020) and 
Member Savings (2010) after this operation.

Safe to run multiple times â skips accounts that already have GL entries.
